title: AEON Sentinel: A BibLaTeX Manuscript Framework for Auditable Epistemology, Triadic AI Assurance, and Recognitive Spacetime Validation
description: A reproducible research scaffold for evidence-linked AI assurance, epistemic drift analysis, triadic attestation, Bayesian decision dossiers, and recognitive state-transition analysis. Demonstration thresholds and metrics are research priors rather than validated operational cutoffs.
